items.summary_zh: 支持在遗传算法指标化过程中固定l值约束，提升已知层间距场景下的收敛效率。
items.summary_en: Support fixed-l value constraint during genetic algorithm indexing to improve convergence for known layer spacing scenarios.

items.summary_zh: 指标化与结果页间采用按钮导航，自动预载outputMiller，实现更流畅的结果复核。
items.summary_en: Button-based navigation between indexing and results pages, with automatic outputMiller preloading for seamless review.

items.summary_zh: 增大原始图和积分图上Miller标记的尺寸和线宽，提升标记辨识度。
items.summary_en: Increased marker sizes and line widths on both raw and integrated images for clearer identification.

items.title_zh: 手动晶胞参数 - 新功能
items.summary_zh: 支持在主页入口后快速进入手动晶胞参数流程，并围绕当前批量生成结果进行更顺畅的浏览和复核。
items.summary_en: The manual cell parameter workflow is now easier to enter from the homepage and better aligned with downstream batch browsing and review.

items.title_zh: 晶胞参数 c 轴滑移可视化
items.summary_zh: GLIDE 结果支持围绕 c 轴滑移变换进行更直观的可视化查看，帮助比对不同分组生成的 FullMiller 标记。
items.summary_en: GLIDE outputs now support clearer visualization around c-axis shear transforms, making it easier to compare generated FullMiller groups.

items.summary_zh: 指标化程序中的结果浏览与可视化联动已进一步增强，方便在同一工作流内查看图像、参数与标记变化。
items.summary_en: Visualization inside the indexing workflow is now better integrated, so image, parameter, and marker changes can be reviewed in one place.
